import React from 'react';

export const I = ({ t, s: z = 22, c = "currentColor" }) => {
  const d = {
    chest:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M8 22c0-6 4-10 10-12h28c6 2 10 6 10 12v4c0 10-8 20-24 24C16 46 8 36 8 26z" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><path d="M32 18v28" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round"/></svg>,
    back:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M12 8c4-2 10-4 20-4s16 2 20 4c2 6 4 14 2 24-2 8-6 16-10 22H20c-4-6-8-14-10-22-2-10 0-18 2-24z" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><path d="M32 8v46" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round"/></svg>,
    shoulders:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><ellipse cx="14" cy="26" rx="12" ry="14" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="26" rx="12" ry="14" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><rect x="22" y="18" width="20" height="24" rx="4" fill={c} opacity=".8"/></svg>,
    legs:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M14 4h12c2 0 3 2 3 4v32c0 4-1 10-2 14l-2 8H12l-2-8c-1-4-2-10-2-14V8c0-2 1-4 3-4z" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><path d="M38 4h12c2 0 3 2 3 4v32c0 4-1 10-2 14l-2 8H36l-2-8c-1-4-2-10-2-14V8c0-2 1-4 3-4z" fill={c} opacity=".8"/></svg>,
    arms:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M42 8c6 0 10 4 12 10l-4 18c-1 4-4 8-8 10H30c-4-2-7-6-8-12L18 16c2-6 6-8 12-8h4" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><ellipse cx="40" cy="14" rx="10" ry="8" fill={c}/></svg>,
    glutes:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><ellipse cx="22" cy="32" rx="16" ry="20" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><ellipse cx="42" cy="32" rx="16" ry="20" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><path d="M32 14v36" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round"/></svg>,
    core:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M18 6h28c4 0 6 3 6 6v36c0 6-4 12-10 14H22c-6-2-10-8-10-14V12c0-3 2-6 6-6z" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><path d="M32 8v50" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round"/><path d="M20 18h24M20 28h24M20 38h24" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2" opacity=".4"/></svg>,
    cardio:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M32 56l-20-22C6 28 4 20 10 14s16-4 22 6c6-10 16-12 22-6s4 14-2 20L32 56z" fill={c}/><polyline points="12,32 22,32 26,22 30,42 34,28 38,36 42,32 52,32" fill="none" stroke="#0A0A0F" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" opacity=".6"/></svg>,
    r0:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="26" fill={c} opacity=".15" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3"/><text x="32" y="41" textAnchor="middle" fill={c} fontSize="28" fontWeight="bold" fontFamily="sans-serif">I</text></svg>,
    r1:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M32 4L8 16v16c0 14 10 24 24 28 14-4 24-14 24-28V16z" fill={c} opacity=".2" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2.5"/><polygon points="32,18 35,27 44,27 37,33 39,42 32,37 25,42 27,33 20,27 29,27" fill={c}/></svg>,
    r2:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><polygon points="32,4 39,22 58,24 44,38 48,58 32,48 16,58 20,38 6,24 25,22" fill={c} stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/></svg>,
    r3:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><polygon points="36,2 14,34 28,34 22,62 50,26 34,26 40,2" fill={c} stroke={c} strokeWidth="2" strokeLinejoin="round"/><polygon points="34,10 20,34 28,34 24,52 44,28 34,28 38,10" fill="#fff" opacity=".25"/></svg>,
    r4:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M32 2c-4 12-16 18-16 32 0 14 8 26 16 28 8-2 16-14 16-28C48 20 36 14 32 2z" fill={c} stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/><path d="M32 22c-2 6-8 10-8 18 0 8 4 14 8 16 4-2 8-8 8-16 0-8-6-12-8-18z" fill="#FFF" opacity=".3"/></svg>,
    r5:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="28" r="22" fill={c} opacity=".15" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2.5"/><polygon points="32,8 36,20 48,20 38,28 42,40 32,33 22,40 26,28 16,20 28,20" fill={c}/><rect x="20" y="50" width="24" height="8" rx="3" fill={c}/><text x="32" y="57" textAnchor="middle" fill="#0A0A0F" fontSize="7" fontWeight="bold" fontFamily="sans-serif">PRO</text></svg>,
    chart:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect x="6" y="34" width="12" height="24" rx="3" fill={c} opacity=".5"/><rect x="26" y="20" width="12" height="38" rx="3" fill={c} opacity=".7"/><rect x="46" y="8" width="12" height="50" rx="3" fill={c}/></svg>,
    gear:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="10"/><path d="M32 6v6M32 52v6M6 32h6M52 32h6M13 13l4.5 4.5M46.5 46.5l4.5 4.5M13 51l4.5-4.5M46.5 17.5l4.5-4.5"/></svg>,
    badge:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="26" r="18" fill={c} opacity=".2" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/><polygon points="32,14 35,22 44,22 37,28 39,36 32,31 25,36 27,28 20,22 29,22" fill={c}/><path d="M22 42l-4 16 14-8 14 8-4-16" fill={c} opacity=".6"/></svg>,
    alex:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="24" r="18" fill={c} opacity=".2" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="3" fill={c}/><circle cx="39" cy="22" r="3" fill={c}/><path d="M24 30c3 4 10 4 16 0" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2.5" fill="none" strokeLinecap="round"/><rect x="22" y="42" width="20" height="16" rx="4" fill={c} opacity=".3"/></svg>,
    cal:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect x="8" y="12" width="48" height="44" rx="6" fill={c} opacity=".15" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2.5"/><line x1="8" y1="24" x2="56" y2="24" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2.5"/><line x1="20" y1="6" x2="20" y2="18" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round"/><line x1="44" y1="6" x2="44" y2="18" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round"/></svg>,
    food:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><ellipse cx="32" cy="38" rx="24" ry="16" fill={c} opacity=".3" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/><path d="M14 34c0-12 8-22 18-22s18 10 18 22" fill={c} opacity=".5" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/></svg>,
    dumbbell:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect x="4" y="20" width="12" height="24" rx="4" fill={c}/><rect x="48" y="20" width="12" height="24" rx="4" fill={c}/><rect x="12" y="16" width="6" height="32" rx="2" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><rect x="46" y="16" width="6" height="32" rx="2" fill={c} opacity=".8"/><rect x="18" y="28" width="28" height="8" rx="3" fill={c} opacity=".6"/></svg>,
    plus:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="24" fill={c} opacity=".15"/><line x1="32" y1="18" x2="32" y2="46" stroke={c} strokeWidth="4" strokeLinecap="round"/><line x1="18" y1="32" x2="46" y2="32" stroke={c} strokeWidth="4" strokeLinecap="round"/></svg>,
    search:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3.5" strokeLinecap="round"><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="16"/><line x1="40" y1="40" x2="54" y2="54"/></svg>,
    history:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="26" fill={c} opacity=".15" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3"/><polyline points="32,16 32,34 44,40" fill="none" stroke={c} strokeWidth="3.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"/></svg>,
    trophy:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M18 8h28v18c0 10-6 18-14 20-8-2-14-10-14-20V8z" fill={c}/><path d="M18 14H8c0 8 4 14 10 16" fill={c} opacity=".5"/><path d="M46 14h10c0 8-4 14-10 16" fill={c} opacity=".5"/><rect x="26" y="46" width="12" height="6" rx="2" fill={c}/><rect x="22" y="52" width="20" height="6" rx="2" fill={c}/></svg>,
    guide:<svg width={z} height={z} viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect x="12" y="4" width="40" height="52" rx="4" fill={c} opacity=".15" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2"/><line x1="20" y1="16" x2="44" y2="16" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="24" x2="44" y2="24" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" opacity=".6"/><line x1="20" y1="32" x2="36" y2="32" stroke={c} strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" opacity=".4"/></svg>,
  };
  return d[t] || null;
};
